member.name: T:TokenNftAllowance
member.summary: Class to encapsulate the nft methods for token allowance's.

member.name: F:TokenNftAllowance.TokenId
member.summary: The NFT token type that the allowance pertains to

member.name: F:TokenNftAllowance.OwnerAccountId
member.summary: The account ID of the token owner (ie. the grantor of the allowance)

member.name: F:TokenNftAllowance.SpenderAccountId
member.summary: The account ID of the token allowance spender

member.name: F:TokenNftAllowance.DelegatingSpender
member.summary: The account ID of the spender who is granted approvedForAll allowance and granting approval on an NFT serial to another spender.

member.name: F:TokenNftAllowance.SerialNumbers
member.summary: The list of serial numbers that the spender is permitted to transfer.

member.name: F:TokenNftAllowance.AllSerials
member.summary: If true, the spender has access to all of the owner's NFT units of type tokenId (currently owned and any in the future).

member.name: M:TokenNftAllowance.CopyFrom(TokenNftAllowance)
member.summary: Create a copy of a nft token allowance object.
member.param: the nft token allowance to copj

member.name: M:TokenNftAllowance.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a nft token allowance from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TokenNftAllowance.FromProtobuf(Proto.NftAllowance)
member.summary: Create a nft token allowance from a protobuf.

member.name: M:TokenNftAllowance.ValidateChecksums(Client)
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly
